entities.name: TRITICUM DURUM
entities.description: A species of wheat used in the creation of synthetic hexaploids

entities.name: AEGILOPS TAUSCHII
entities.description: A wild grass species used to derive synthetic hexaploids for wheat improvement

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The general cereal crop being improved for heat stress tolerance

entities.name: INDO GANGETIC PLAINS
entities.description: The geographical region where early sowing is practiced to avoid terminal heat stress

entities.name: TERMINAL HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Heat stress occurring at the end of the crop growth cycle

entities.name: JUVENILE HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Heat stress occurring during the early seedling or juvenile stage of growth

entities.name: SYNTHETIC HEXAPLOIDS OF WHEAT
entities.description: Wheat lines derived from the crossing of Triticum durum and Aegilops tauschii

entities.name: SYN14128
entities.description: A specific synthetic hexaploid wheat line showing potential for juvenile heat stress tolerance

entities.name: SYN14170
entities.description: A specific synthetic hexaploid wheat line screened for juvenile heat stress

entities.name: SEEDLING LENGTH
entities.description: A growth parameter used to screen for heat stress tolerance

entities.name: AMYLASE GENE
entities.description: A gene encoding amylase, involved in the plant's response to heat stress

entities.name: AMY4
entities.description: A specific amylase gene whose expression is linked to juvenile heat stress tolerance

entities.name: HEAT SHOCK
entities.description: Exposure to high temperatures, specifically 45 °C for 12, 20, and 24 hours

entities.name: MALONDIALDEHYDE
entities.description: A biochemical marker used to measure oxidative damage

entities.name: HYDROGEN PEROXIDE
entities.description: A biochemical marker used to measure oxidative stress

entities.name: FREE RADICAL SCAVENGING ACTIVITIES
entities.description: The biochemical ability of the plant to neutralize reactive oxygen species

entities.name: TOTAL SOLUBLE SUGAR
entities.description: A biochemical parameter measured to assess heat stress response

entities.name: OXIDATIVE DAMAGE
entities.description: Damage to cellular components caused by heat-induced oxidative stress

entities.name: JUVENILE HEAT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and function under heat stress at the juvenile stage

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The objective of ensuring stable food supply amidst population growth and climate change
